title: space_join space_id path: no body-shape test
description: Test 54 covers only the invite_code path with a body_json matcher that verifies inviteCode is sent and spaceId is absent. There is no test that fires the space_id path with a body_json matcher verifying spaceId is sent and inviteCode is absent. If the conditional in space_join were swapped (e.g. args["spaceId"] written where inviteCode belongs), no test would catch it. The missing test is: SpaceJoinInput { invite_code: None, space_id: Some("...") } with a body_json matcher asserting { accountId, spaceId } and no inviteCode key.
